channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Nvidia retiring PhysX for its RTX 5000 GPUs has made some gamers furious - but I don't think it's a complete dealbreaker
item.description: Nvidia can't catch a break at the moment with its RTX 5000 series GPUs, as users discover 32-bit PhysX support required for enhanced visuals in older games isn't present on Blackwell GPUs.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Startup Opkey launches agentic AI platform for ERP lifecycle optimization
item.description: Opkey, a startup with roots in ERP test automation, today unveiled its agentic AI-powered ERP Lifecycle Optimization Platform, saying it will simplify ERP management, reduce costs by up to 50%, and reduce testing time by as much as 85%.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: IT infrastructure: Inventory before AIOps
item.description: There is hardly a topic where digital heritage (or “legacy”) plays such an important role as in infrastructure. The inventory in your own data center is crucial when answering the question of which technologies can be used in the medium term.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Top network and data center events 2025
item.description: Ready to travel to gain hands-on experience with new networking and infrastructure tools? Tech conferences – in person and virtual – give attendees a chance to access product demos, network with peers, earn continuing education credits, and catch a celebrity keynote or live entertainment.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How LinkedIn became luxury fashion’s newest runway
item.description: As Fashion Week takes over New York, London, and Milan, designers aren’t just showcasing their collections on the runway—they’re taking over LinkedIn.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: New European AI weather model to improve forecasts
item.description: The European Center for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts (ECMWF) has made its new AI model, the Artificial Intelligence Forecasting System (AIFS), available to everyone free of charge. Medium-range weather forecasts are those that predict weather conditions for three to 15 days into the future.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: New Relic boosts observability platform with AI intelligence
item.description: New Relic announced updates to its Intelligent Observability Platform this week, which the company says will enable a unified view of system relationships and dependencies and intelligently connect technical systems with business context.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Bitcoin slides under $90,000, erasing some of the gains made under Trump
item.description: The price of bitcoin fell below $90,000 and other cryptocurrencies saw large drops Tuesday morning, erasing some of the gains digital assets have made since President Donald Trump took office on a pro-crypto agenda.
item.dc:creator: Alan Suderman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Why Nvidia’s earnings are important to the entire U.S. stock market
item.description: Nvidia stock’s movement carries more weight on the S&P 500 and other indexes than every company except Apple.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: How to use Gemini AI to write (and rewrite) in Google Docs and Gmail
item.description: Whether you’re a professional writer or someone who dreads having to compose documents or emails for your job, the potential of AI assistance for your writing tasks is appealing.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 3 strategies for carbon-free data centers
item.description: The construction of massive data center campuses is booming, with hyperscalers, colocation providers and large enterprises developing new capacity to support the exploding requirements of AI.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: JDK 24: The new features in Java 24
item.description: Java Development Kit (JDK) 24 has entered the final release candidate stage. The next version of standard Java will ship with 24 features, ranging from a class-file API to a fourth preview of structured concurrency.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Apple shareholders reject proposal to scrap company's diversity programs
item.description: Apple shareholders rebuffed an attempt to pressure the technology trendsetter into joining President Donald Trump’s push to scrub corporate programs designed to diversify its workforce.
item.dc:creator: Michael Liedtke, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Apple announces $500 billion investment in US amid tariff threats that could affect the iPhone
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Apple announced Monday that it plans to invest more than $500 billion in the United States over the next four years, including plans to hire 20,000 people and build a new server factory in Texas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: This is what no one planned could happen after taking a DNA test
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says DNA tests pose privacy risks like shared genetic information, inaccuracies and hard data deletion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brazil Supreme Court justice orders Rumble suspension nationwide for alleged non-compliance
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — A Brazilian Supreme Court justice on Friday ordered the suspension of video-sharing platform Rumble in the South American nation for allegedly refusing to comply with court orders.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Sweden is investigating a damaged cable in the Baltic Sea
item.description: STOCKHOLM (AP) — Swedish authorities said on Friday they were investigating a damaged cable that was discovered in the Baltic Sea, the latest in a string of recent incidents of ruptured undersea cables that have heightened fears of Russian sabotage and spying in the region.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Apple drops encryption feature for UK users after government reportedly demanded backdoor access
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple said Friday it will stop offering an advanced data security option for British users after the government reportedly demanded that the company provide backdoor access for any data those users have stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
